zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wyatt於1412年出生在英國英格蘭易斯爾 本 懷特時，他的父親John Wyatt32歲，母親Margaret Swynhowe34歲。他於1444年與Joan de Grene在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1482年10月4日在英國英格蘭享年70歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾亞德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Wyatt于1412年出生在英国英格兰易斯爾 本 懷特时，他的父亲John Wyatt32岁，母亲Margaret Swynhowe34岁。他于1444年与Joan de Grene在英国巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1482年10月4日在英国英格兰享年70岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾亞德利。

nameMeanings.name: Wyatt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal names Wiot or Wiet. These are often pet forms of Wy, from ancient Germanic Wido (see Guy , compare Wyand 1). Wy is the usual Norman French form of the name; the Parisian French form is Guy. Wiot was also used as a diminutive of William . As a surname Wyot(t) became Wyatt during the 16th century.

in Suffolk, this is sometimes a variant of Wyard, from the Middle English personal name Wiard, which is generally from Old English Wīgheard, which is composed of the elements wīg ‘battle’ + heard ‘bold, brave’. Occasionally it may be from Old French Wiard, ancient Germanic Withard (see Viard ).

variants.name: Wyeth
meanings: English (Hampshire): perhaps a variant of   Wyatt  .
History: Nicholas Wyeth emigrated from Suffolk, England to Cambridge, MA, before 1645. John Wyeth (1770–1858) was born in Cambridge and became a prominent publisher and editor in Harrisburg, PA.

variants.name: Guy
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from a common Old French personal name Guy, from ancient Germanic Wido, a short form of compound names based on the element wid(u) ‘wood, forest’, Latinized as Guido .
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, an occupational name for a guide, Old French gui (a derivative of gui(d)er ‘to guide’, of ancient Germanic origin).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wyatt was born in 1412, in Isle of Wight, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Wyatt, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Swynhowe, was 34. He married Joan de Grene in 1444, in Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 4 October 1482, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Yardley, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Wyatt est né en 1412, à Isle of Wight, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wyatt, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Swynhowe, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Grene en 1444, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1482, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Yardley, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

Lui sposato Joan de Grene nel 1444, nel Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wyattが1412年にイギリスイギリスイスル オフ ウィトで生まれた時，父John Wyattは32歳，母Margaret Swynhoweは34歳であった。1444年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでJoan de Greneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1482年10月4日にイギリスイギリスで70歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアヤードリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wyatt(이)가 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 이슬일 프 와이트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wyatt(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Swynhowe(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1444년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Joan de Grene(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1482년 10월 4일 영국 잉글랜드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 야어들리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wyatt nasceu em 1412, em Isle of Wight, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Wyatt, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Swynhowe, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Grene em 1444, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1482, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Yardley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Engl: нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Wyatt родился в 1412 г. в местности исл оф ваит, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Wyatt было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Swynhowe, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Grene в 1444 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 4 октября 1482 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности ярдли, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Wyatt nació en 1412, en Isle of Wight, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Wyatt, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Swynhowe, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Joan de Grene en 1444, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1482, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Yardley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
